description: GLMP-focused scout configuration — biology, regulatory circuits, computational genomics

pubmed_queries.name: Gene Regulation Core
pubmed_queries.query: transcription factor[MeSH] OR gene regulation[MeSH] OR promoter regions[MeSH]

pubmed_queries.name: Regulatory Circuits and Operons
pubmed_queries.query: gene regulatory network[MeSH] OR regulatory circuit OR operon[MeSH] OR bistable switch gene

pubmed_queries.name: Single Cell Genomics
pubmed_queries.query: single-cell RNA-seq[MeSH] OR scRNA-seq OR RNA velocity OR single cell sequencing OR Perturb-seq

pubmed_queries.name: Synthetic Biology
pubmed_queries.query: synthetic biology[MeSH] OR genetic circuit design OR logic gate gene expression

pubmed_queries.name: Computational Biology Methods
pubmed_queries.query: FIMO OR MEME suite OR motif scanning OR ChIP-seq[MeSH] OR ATAC-seq OR transcription factor binding site prediction

pubmed_queries.name: High Impact Biology Journals
pubmed_queries.query: (Nature[JOUR] OR Science[JOUR] OR Cell[JOUR] OR Nature Genetics[JOUR] OR Nature Methods[JOUR] OR Genome Research[JOUR] OR Nucleic Acids Research[JOUR]) AND (gene regulation OR regulatory network OR transcription factor OR genomics)

pubmed_queries.name: DNA Binding and Motifs
pubmed_queries.query: DNA binding motif[MeSH] OR JASPAR OR position weight matrix OR transcription factor binding specificity

pubmed_queries.name: Key Labs and Authors
pubmed_queries.query: Voigt CA[Author] OR Weissman JS[Author] OR Regev A[Author] OR Yanofsky C[Author] OR Schleif R[Author] OR Stormo GD[Author]

pubmed_queries.name: Cancer Regulatory Circuits
pubmed_queries.query: cancer gene regulation[MeSH] OR oncogene transcription factor OR tumor suppressor regulatory OR K562 gene expression OR MYC regulatory circuit

pubmed_queries.name: Microbiology and Prokaryotic Regulation
pubmed_queries.query: E. coli gene regulation OR bacterial transcription regulation OR prokaryotic regulatory circuit OR operon regulation bacteria

arxiv_queries.name: Quantitative Biology — Genomics and Molecular Networks
Quantitative Biology — Cell Behavior and Biophysics
ML and AI Applied to Biology
arxiv_queries.keyword_filter: biology OR genomics OR gene OR regulatory OR protein OR DNA OR RNA
